{{Infobox group
| name = Seishen Underlords
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen]] Underlords are powerful combatants belonging to the [[Seishen Kingdom]]. They possess [[Soulfire]], which serves as a defining characteristic of their rank. These individuals are capable of utilizing various flight methods, including Thousand-Mile Clouds, [[Remnants]], or specific flight techniques. While they are formidable enough to hold their own in the world, they lack the strength required to combat much more powerful entities such as [[Monarchs]], [[Dreadgods]], or monsters. Despite their strength, they have been overcome by individuals who were still at the [[Truegold]] stage of power.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Underlords]] are a group of Underlords.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Underlords]] would stand no chance against [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] considered looting the [[Seishen Underlords]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Seishen Underlords]] were bundled into the black carriage.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has overcome the [[Seishen Underlords]] while he was a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seishen Underlords]] were nearby.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
